message:
test(persist,smoke): fr-persist metamorphic tests + RESP3 line rustfmt

crates/fr-persist/tests/metamorphic.rs (new)
  * Standalone proptest file for `fr-persist` (previously all
    metamorphic coverage lived inside
    `crates/fr-persist/src/lib.rs`'s `#[cfg(test)]` block — this
    externalizes the AOF / RDB round-trip invariants so they show
    up in `cargo test -p fr-persist --tests` separately from the
    unit-tests in `src/lib.rs`).
  * Imports: `{AofRecord, RdbEntry, RdbValue, decode_aof_stream,
    decode_rdb, encode_aof_stream, encode_rdb}` from fr-persist,
    `proptest::prelude::*`.
  * Strategies:
      - `arb_key()`            — 1..64 arbitrary bytes
      - `arb_value()`          — 0..256 arbitrary bytes
      - `arb_field_value()`    — (key, value) tuple
      - `arb_finite_f64()`     — filters out NaN/Inf so the
        round-trip invariants aren't sabotaged by f64 equality
        surprises.
  * Properties landed:
      - AOF encode→decode round-trip preserves the record stream
        byte-identically.
      - RDB encode→decode round-trip preserves RdbEntry ordering,
        key bytes, and value shape across all type discriminants.
      - Mixed-type RDB streams (string + hash + zset in the same
        encode) round-trip without cross-talk between entries.

crates/fr-conformance/tests/smoke.rs
  * Rustfmt-only reflow in `read_live_resp3_line(input, start)`:
    the signature was broken across three lines unnecessarily;
    rustfmt collapses it to a single line. The body's `input.get(start..)`
    short-circuit gets the same single-line treatment. No
    behavior change — `git diff -w` across this hunk is empty.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
